name: LaseQueen MaPetite Q-switched Nd:YAG Laser (Limited Edition)
shortDescription: Limited edition LaseQueen ND:YAG laser with 6 treatment heads. Tattoo, pigment, carbon peeling, scar treatment, nail fungus. With B-number certified training.
description: The LaseQueen MaPetite is the limited edition of the popular LaseQueen laser. The same 6-head technology, the same water-air hybrid cooling system, and F5 laser crystal rod – in an exclusive, limited-quantity design.
metaTitle: LaseQueen MaPetite Limited Edition – Q-switched ND:YAG Laser
metaDescription: LaseQueen MaPetite limited edition ND:YAG laser with 6 heads: tattoo, pigment, carbon peeling, scar treatment, nail fungus. B-number training and 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: LaseQueen MaPetite – Limited Edition, Full Capability
paragraphs: The LaseQueen MaPetite is the limited edition of the popular LaseQueen laser, offering the same professional technology in an exclusive design.
With 6 treatment heads, water-air hybrid cooling, and F5 laser crystal rod, the MaPetite can do it all: tattoo removal, pigment treatment, carbon peeling, scar treatment, and nail fungus treatment.
Available in limited quantities – if you're interested, don't wait too long!

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the LaseQueen MaPetite laser? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the LaseQueen MaPetite Limited Edition?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why choose the LaseQueen MaPetite?
featureRows.subtitle: Limited edition, full feature set – with 6 treatment heads

features.title: 6 treatment heads – the complete treatment palette
features.description:
The LaseQueen MaPetite features 6 different wavelength treatment heads that offer more comprehensive functions than the standard 3-head devices.

Treatment heads:

532 nm – reddish, light brown pigments
532 nm No Scar – gentle pigment removal
755 nm – Hollywood carbon peeling
1064 nm – dark pigments, deep tattoos
1064 nm No Scar – scar-free tattoo removal
1320 nm – carbon peeling / blackdoll

features.title: Versatile treatment options
features.description:
The LaseQueen MaPetite is also suitable for scar treatment and nail fungus treatment beyond tattoo removal – in a single device.

Application areas:

Body tattoo removal
Permanent makeup removal
Carbon peeling
Pigmentation spot removal
Scar treatment
Nail fungus treatment

features.title: Premium technology – F5 crystal and hybrid cooling
features.description:
The F5 pink laser crystal rod ensures even energy output, while the water-air hybrid condenser cooling system guarantees long lifespan.

Technology features:

F5 pink laser crystal rod
Water-air hybrid condenser cooling system
Precise focusing scale and infrared aiming point
Short pulse width – minimal skin damage

training.headline: Operator training – official B-number certified training
training.intro: An official, B-number certified training course in an adult education framework is available for the LaseQueen MaPetite laser. Upon completion, we issue a B-number certificate confirming course completion.
items: Operating principles of Q-switched ND:YAG laser technology
Application areas and correct use of all 6 treatment heads
Treatment protocols: tattoo, pigment, carbon peeling, scar treatment
Laser protocol for nail fungus treatment
Contraindications, skin type assessment, and safe treatment
closingParagraphs: The training's goal is for participants to safely and within legal frameworks apply the LaseQueen MaPetite laser for cosmetic and aesthetic treatments.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official FAR certificate.

testimonials.name: Kovács Réka
testimonials.text: The LaseQueen MaPetite limited edition really impressed me – <mark>the same 6-head technology but with an exclusive appearance</mark>. Carbon peeling and tattoo removal both work excellently. The training was very useful too!

expertQuote.quote: The LaseQueen MaPetite is where the charm of the limited edition meets professional technology. The same 6-head system, the same reliability – in limited quantities.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: How does the MaPetite differ from the regular LaseQueen?
faq.answer: The MaPetite is the LaseQueen's limited edition with exclusive design. Technologically identical: same 6 treatment heads, F5 laser crystal, hybrid cooling system, and treatment options. The difference lies solely in the limited edition's aesthetic appearance.

faq.question: What treatments is the LaseQueen MaPetite suitable for?
faq.answer: Body tattoo and permanent makeup removal, carbon peeling, pigment spot treatment, scar treatment, and nail fungus treatment. The 6 treatment heads provide more comprehensive functions than the standard 3-head devices.

faq.question: How quickly does it pay for itself?
faq.answer: With the favorable price category and versatile usage combination, it pays for itself on average within 1-2 months with 3-5 clients per day. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: An official, B-number, FAR-registered operator training is included FREE with device purchase (79,990 Ft value). The training covers everything from using all 6 treatment heads to specialized treatments.

faq.question: Can I view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the LaseQueen MaPetite in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.
